title: Aurora, 33945, Palm Pals Priscilla Princess Kitty 5In, Soft Toy, White
features: Let's meet the Palm Pals Priscilla Princess Kitty Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This charming white kitty plush is filled with beans and fits perfectly into your palm, making it great for small cuddling and a wonderful gift for any occasion!

The Priscilla Princess Kitty is part of the Palm Pals Pets collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Sports, Critters, Zoo, Aquatic, and many more. These plushies are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials.

Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Priscilla Princess Kitty measures 13cm. Priscilla Princess Kitty, presenting her Royal Highness, the very essence of poise and refinement! She reigns upon her kingdom with a gentle paw and a purr of pure elegance. She delights in all things splendid and grand, and every encounter with her is an invitation to partake in the finer pleasures of the court.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful plush and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Let's meet our Palm Pals Priscilla Princess Kitty Soft Toy, 5in, from Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection This charming white kitty plush is filled with beans and fits perfectly into your palm, making it great for small cuddling and is a wonderful gift for any occasion! The Priscilla Princess Kitty plush is part of the Palm Pals Pets collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Whimsical, Craving, Critters, Zoo, Aquatic, and many more. These soft toys are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute. Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials. Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Priscilla Princess Kitty Soft Toy measures 13cm Priscilla Princess Kitty, presenting her Royal Highness, the very essence of poise and refinement! She reigns upon her kingdom with a gentle paw and a purr of pure elegance. She delights in all things splendid and grand, and every encounter with her is an invitation to partake in the finer pleasures of the court. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
